description_long: This pair of dangling earrings features an ornate, filigree metalwork in a dark brass or antique gold tone, forming an intricate, symmetrical lattice pattern. Suspended from each earring are several decorative beads, including a large oval bead with a marbled greenish-black finish, and smaller round beads in shades of blue, turquoise, and gray. The earrings are attached to simple fishhook ear wires, making them easy to wear. The metalwork is open and airy, with delicate loops and curves that give the earrings a vintage, bohemian flair. The beads add a pop of color and texture, contrasting with the metallic base. Overall, the design is both eye-catching and elegant, suitable for urban streetwear or casual chic settings.
description: A pair of ornate, filigree metal earrings with dangling marbled and colored beads, combining vintage and bohemian elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full filigree pattern and all dangling beads clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and layering of the beads and metalwork, with the oval bead most prominent.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, displaying the symmetrical design and bead arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the profile of the dangling beads and the thinness of the metalwork.
